title: Delving Mastery
summary: Delving branches between underground extraction and underwater discovery. Both branches reward going where most players won't — and finding what's there.

thresholds.title: First Descent
thresholds.description: Choose whether your mastery favors the cave or the sea.

thresholds.title: Steady Excavation
thresholds.description: Your chosen route changes the pace and safety of a run.

thresholds.title: Ore Sense
thresholds.description: A committed specialist now feels distinct in the deep.

thresholds.title: Deep Delver
thresholds.description: Late mastery turns your branch into a full Delving identity.

nodes.title: First Charter
nodes.description: The charter states that earth and tide yield only to those who read their silence.

nodes.title: Lantern Oath
nodes.description: Cave notes praise the delver who carries light as if it were another pick.

nodes.title: Tide Breath
nodes.description: The diver margin teaches a calm lung and slower pulse before the water closes overhead.

nodes.title: Ore Scent
nodes.description: A scratched line claims stone changes tone when metal sleeps behind it.

nodes.title: Ruin Compass
nodes.description: The diver's chapter describes currents that whisper the way to drowned halls.

nodes.title: Dual Survey
nodes.description: This center note binds cavern instinct and tidecraft into one method of discovery.

nodes.title: Deep Claim
nodes.description: The inner spelunker pages teach carving safe paths where hostile depths once ruled.

nodes.title: Stone Memory
nodes.description: Outer cave passages describe reading strata like a script written over ages.

nodes.title: Abyssal Route
nodes.description: The diver's inner chart preserves routes through monument gloom where panic drowns crews.

nodes.title: Pressure Ward
nodes.description: Outer watercraft notes describe charms and habits that keep bones and courage intact.

nodes.title: King's Vein
nodes.description: Hidden beneath wax, this note names a seam that crowns any miner bold enough to descend.

nodes.title: Sunken Crown
nodes.description: A sealed sea-folio whispers of treasure courts that sleep beneath black water.
